_comments.blueStacksPorts: List of ports where BlueStacks instances are running
_comments.evonyPackage: Android package name for Evony app
_comments.evonyActivity: Main activity name for Evony app
_comments.tapRetryTimeout: Max time (ms) to retry failed tap operations
_comments.swipeRetryTimeout: Max time (ms) to retry failed swipe operations
_comments.screenStateTimeout: Max time (ms) to wait for screen state changes (wait_for_screen tool)
_comments.logRetentionLines: Number of logcat lines to include in debug bundles
_comments.coordinateScaleX: X-axis coordinate scaling factor (for non-standard resolutions)
_comments.coordinateScaleY: Y-axis coordinate scaling factor (for non-standard resolutions)
